column1: Xavier Edwards leads the slate with a strong track record of consistency, reaching base safely in nearly 80% of his games and benefitting from a leadoff role at home with a favorable park boost. He draws a soft matchup against Christian Scott, who has struggled to limit hits to lefties, further increasing Edwards’ reliability. Yandy Diaz offers similar steadiness atop the order and enters with a recent uptick in form, while Alec Burleson and Riley Greene also profile as solid options with platoon advantages.
